summary: Comprehensive testing of Interactive Quizzes and Learning Paths features. All backend tests passed (13/13). All UI tests passed.

issues: Minor React warning: duplicate key warnings in table rendering - does not affect functionality

test_credentials: No credentials needed - MOCKED Auth with hardcoded admin (admin@emergent.sh)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Interactive quizzes and learning paths features fully tested and working. Quiz data stored in MongoDB 'quizzes' collection. Learning paths in 'learning_paths' collection. Progress tracking uses localStorage key 'aa-learning-progress'.

interactive_quizzes.details: Documents with quizzes show 'Test Your Understanding' section at bottom. Multiple-choice questions with A/B/C/D options. Selecting options highlights them (purple accent color). Check Answers button disabled until all questions answered, shows (X/Y) count. After submit: correct answers green, wrong answers red, explanations shown for each. Score displayed (e.g., 'Score: 0/4 (0%)'). Try Again button resets quiz. Documents WITHOUT quizzes do NOT show quiz section.

quiz_api.details: GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/quiz returns questions array. Tested with doc_id f53aecbb-3b19-478c-9912-66d82827f402 (What Is an AI Agent?) - has 4 questions. Each question has: id, question, options[], correct (index), explanation. Documents without quizzes return empty questions array.

learning_paths_page.details: /learn route renders LearningPathsPage. Shows 4 learning path cards with title, description, difficulty badge (beginner/intermediate/advanced with distinct colors), estimated time, and number of lessons. Clicking a card opens path detail view.

learning_path_detail.details: Shows numbered steps (1, 2, 3...) with step title and description. 'Start Reading' and 'Mark Complete' buttons per step. Progress bar at top shows percentage. 'All Paths' back button returns to main page. Clicking 'Start Reading' navigates to the document.

learning_paths_api.details: GET /api/learning-paths returns 4 paths: Beginner (5 steps), Builder (7 steps), LLM Foundations (6 steps), Practitioner (6 steps). GET /api/learning-paths/{id} returns path with steps array. Each step has document_id, title, description. All document_ids reference valid documents. 404 for nonexistent path IDs.

progress_tracking.details: Mark Complete saves to localStorage key 'aa-learning-progress'. Format: {'{pathId}:{docId}': true}. Progress percentage updates in UI. Persists across page reloads.

sidebar_learning_paths_link.details: Sidebar has 'Learning Paths' link with Telescope icon. Positioned between Bookmarks and Tools in sidebar navigation.

documents_without_quizzes.details: Tested System Architecture Overview doc - quiz section does NOT appear. Comments section still shows normally.

mocked_apis.authentication: MOCKED - hardcoded admin user (admin@emergent.sh). All users treated as admin. No real Google OAuth flow.

console_warnings.details: React warnings about duplicate keys in table rendering and HTML nesting (<span> in <tr>, <th>/<td> in <span>). Does not affect functionality - cosmetic issue only.
